Asset Allocation Summit: Opportunities in Direxion's Leveraged-Inverse Suite
The market's riskiest way to trade on the biggest tech stocks is not well understood by investors
Investors bet on Nvidia share recovery with buying of leveraged ETFs

holdings.infoBox: NVDU is an equity ETF with a total of 18 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 47.86%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 23.26%, NVIDIA at 10.45%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 9.66%, and Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 8.65%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily NVDA Bull 2X ETF (NVDU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of NVIDIA stock. NVDU was launched on Sep 13, 2023 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Nvidia Earnings in the Books, But This ETF Remains Useful
data.text: Nvidia (NVDA) earnings are now a thing of the past with markets having effectively digested another stellar quarter from the largest company by market capitalization.

data.title: Top 2024 ETFs tied to one stock: Nvidia
data.text: Nvidia's hot streak has been a boon for investors who own the common stock, but it's supercharging a handful of ETFs that are betting double on the chipmaker's moves.
